[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01110101 5
1 10100110 4
2 10100001 3
3 11101000 4
4 01101001 4
5 10101111 6
6 00101111 5
7 01100010 3

01 10 11111111 a
12 21 11010011 5
23 32 00000111 3
34 43 11000011 4
45 54 01111110 6
56 65 00010101 3
67 76 10000111 4
70 07 00000100 1

02 20 00101100 3
13 31 11010100 4
24 42 11000100 3
35 53 10111101 6
46 64 01101011 5
57 75 10010010 3
60 06 10000011 3
71 17 11111011 7

03 30 00101011 4
14 41 00010111 4
25 52 10111010 5
36 63 10101000 3
47 74 11101100 5
50 05 10010110 4
61 16 01111100 5
72 27 00101000 2

04 40 11101000 4 match 3
15 51 01101001 4 match 4
26 62 10101111 6 match 5
37 73 00101111 5 match 6
